title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Ceva Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Ceva Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
